privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json. The task uses the CT Cranium DICOM dataset sourced from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip (real public dataset). Task involves scrolling through axial slices of a loaded DICOM series in InVesalius 3 application. No privileged information metadata claims were found to verify.
